cn.description:
IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

全球超百万玩家上头的女帝模拟器、真人实拍互动影视新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇现已全球多平台同步上线！《隐形守护者》开发团队 New One Studio 倾力打造！

约1000分钟超长真人演绎全新篇章，批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手斡旋朝野势力；结盟翻盘周旋怀柔，在真伪难辨的后宫博弈与惊心动魄的朝堂交锋中步步为营。从命悬一线到权倾天下，百种活法闯出重围！

【能称帝的互动爽剧，活下来就登基】 从身处绝境到走上权力巅峰，或踏平肃清、或从容化解，这条路上胆敢阻扰你的一切，终将烟消云散。权倾朝野、各掌一方的朝臣势力...当他们向你奉上一片赤诚，你是选择以真情相报、共担风雨，还是不动声色，将这份情意悉数纳入局中，化为勘破天下、执掌乾坤的一枚枚棋子？活成只属于自己的爽剧主角，万般抉择，终成你的盛世天下。

【4K再现传统美学，沉浸体验盛世风华】 从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐；从实景搭建的恢弘宫苑，到立体鲜活的人物刻画。媚娘篇和女帝篇共约1500分钟超长真人实拍篇章，搭配最高4K质感呈现，力求呈现东方宫阙的磅礴气象，带你亲身谱写一场波澜壮阔的东方权谋华章。

【深度交互升级，指尖上的施政博弈】 权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡！指尖轻触，批阅万机奏折；颁布圣旨，执掌朝野格局。是严明法度、肃清朝纲，还是广施仁政、怀柔天下？在重重掣肘中施展帝王权术，开创你的盛世！ 还有升级版专属帝王测试报告，深度剖析你的权谋风骨、危机决断与御人之道。在故事的结束，遇见最真实的自己。

《盛世天下》女帝篇，现已正式上线！立即下载体验，你的盛世，由你执掌！
cn.description:
本作品需全程联网。媚娘篇内容共为十六集，女帝篇内容共为三十二集，均含免费体验章节。

● 能称帝的互动爽剧，活下来就登基！百万销量口碑新篇《盛世天下》女帝篇正式上线

全球百万销量、斩获多项年度大奖的《盛世天下》媚娘篇新篇现已全球多平台正式上线！
立即体验这场惊心动魄的朝堂博弈，共同踏上女帝传奇登顶之路！你的每一个选择，都在塑造独一无二的剧情体验。

《盛世天下》女帝篇开启全新剧情与抉择：
——约1000分钟超长真人实拍篇章（较媚娘篇剧情扩容超2倍）
——4K电影级画面质感，沉浸体验盛世风华
——全新深度交互玩法：批奏折、颁圣旨，亲手执掌朝堂格局
——升级版专属人格测试：在故事的最后遇见真实的自己

● 4K电影级质感，极致东方宫廷盛宴
全程真人演绎、实景搭建，以4K电影的光影调度，匠心复刻东方宫阙的磅礴气象。从锦缎华服、非遗道具的细腻肌理，到古韵悠扬、震撼人心的国风配乐，全方位展现极致的东方古典美学。
由官鸿、黄羿、姚弛、林小宅等知名演员倾情出演。更具真实惊险刺激的体验、更恢弘的场景、更细腻的人物刻画，让盛世不止存在于荧幕之中，而真实铺展于眼前。你将亲身体验“君临天下”的东方美学盛宴！

● 从默默无闻少女到传奇女帝，你的剧本你来写！
想冲破命运的裹挟？在本作中，你将体验到最惊心动魄的宫廷权谋博弈！从默默无闻的少女，到在多方势力的掣肘中破局，最终登顶权力巅峰。感受运筹帷幄、制衡朝野的帝王智慧，这条逆天改命的称帝之路，由你亲手开创！

● 约1500分钟真人演绎内容，沉浸体验帝王人生
匠心打磨的媚娘篇与女帝篇共约1500分钟实拍篇章，为你铺陈开一幅波澜壮阔的盛世画卷。面对波谲云诡的朝堂局势，你的每一次落子、每一个抉择，都将引发蝴蝶效应。高燃反转、重重悬疑……在步步惊心中执掌乾坤，亲手改写王朝命运！
为你情有独钟或爱恨交织的角色打榜助力，谁能问鼎全球人气榜首，全在你的掌控之中。

● 告别旁观，真正体验执掌天下
摒弃枯燥的点击对话，体验深度交互玩法！权力不再是一句单薄的台词，而是你指尖实打实的朝堂制衡 ：
【批阅奏折】：指尖轻点，批阅如山奏折。平衡世家门阀，一笔落定，便是江山气象。
【颁布圣旨】：权衡利弊裁定朝野格局。是施行严明法度，还是施以仁君之恩？在掣肘中展现帝王权术，实现海晏河清的盛世宏图！

● 你是什么类型的帝王？专属人格测试报告升级
在故事的终点，你还将获得一份升级版专属帝王测试报告！深度剖析你的权谋风格、危机决策与御人手段。究竟是权情兼收、八面玲珑的“绝命鹤顶红”，至情至性、赴汤蹈火的“风月曼陀罗”，还是心狠手辣、一心问鼎的“卷王见手青”？在故事的终点，看见最真实的自己，生成你的专属人格图鉴分享给全世界！

【核心特色：这就是你从未体验过的江湖】

1.  “移动端发货”：独属于你的无缝武侠大世界，真实武林画卷
       无读条世界：告别加载画面！我们打造了一个面积达256丈的无缝大世界——中原、江南、西域、南疆……从熙熙攘攘的古城街区，到人迹罕至的雪山秘境，所有场景皆可自由探索。
       活的江湖：昼夜、真实天气、万物动态（可破坏环境、可拾取万物）。世界不仅仅是背景，更是可交互的阶段。
       无束缚体验：轻功飞跃山河，踏波而行，攀爬峭壁。你的武侠梦，不再受束缚。

（我们的核心是创造一个‘无界’的武侠世界。在这里，地图没有空气墙，探索没有读条，整个世界是连贯、可交互、充满生机的）

2.  “第一代最受欢迎的玩法”：千种武学心法，自由搭配的武侠战斗
       没有僵化的“职业”限制！我们提供了超过数百种内功、外功、轻功、技艺。你可以是刀剑双绝的豪侠，也可以是精通音律、以琴音伤人的雅士，甚至是暗器毒术无双的“邪派”高手。
       武学招式不再是一成不变的关键循环。采用我们“无规则”战斗系统，所有的招式心苦自由搭配、组合，你自己的套路。是追求一击必杀的极限爆发，还是决定组建全场连绵不绝的控制？战斗的策略与乐趣，完全交由你。

3.  “你的江湖”：高自由度的人生，你的选择就是规则
       江湖不是非黑即白。你的每一个抉择都会引发难以想象的“因果链”。救下一个路人，他可能就是你未来宗门的引荐人；偷听一桩秘密，或许会让你卷入颠覆王朝的阴谋。
       可以选择拜入名门正派的恪守门规，也可以加入诡谲魔教随心所欲，更可以做个散人，逍遥自在。甚至可以完全抛开打杀，成为一名富甲天下的商贾、巧夺天工的匠人，也可以悬壶济世的神医。这个世界，认可你的每一种活法。

4.  “多达700万字的文本内容，庞大的玩法量级”：沙盒奇遇，要素隐藏线索
       《下一站江湖Ⅱ》的世界是“活”的。NPC们有自己的生活记录和喜怒哀乐。你可能在悬崖下发现前辈遗骸，学到失传绝学；也可能一碗酒，结交到一位隐世高人。
       大量未在任务列表中标记的“奇遇”事件散落在世界各个角落。探索的回报远超你的想象，真正的宝藏，永远献给最好奇的旅人。

5.  “市井百业，多维度沉浸身份”：技艺百态，感受江湖的烟火气
       江湖不止有武功。我们深入嵌入了当今同类生活技能：采矿、采药、锻造、制琴、象棋、书法、绘画、厨艺……这些不仅仅是赚钱的手段，更是提升角色、解锁特殊剧情和关卡能力的关键。一门技艺的技能，也能让你名动江湖。

【故事背景：游戏基础框架】（持续更新）
700万文字庞大世界观：战国末期，三国、百家、江湖！

1.  角色扮演：
① 多出身多结局，每个主角都是全新体验（当前已将门之子、富家千金、寒门书生、江湖浪子、无名小卒等五大身出300多万字主线剧情接近20个结局）

2.  市井身份：
① 皈依各器皿特色的城井身份独特的对应独立剧情、规则玩法。比如刺客对应青衣楼的门玩法派、以及相关的物品万字独立剧情，突出的悬赏及刺杀玩法等

3.  江湖霸图：模拟经营、骑砍LIKE、世界建造
① 物品可加入各具特色的门派
② 每个派都有自己的独立剧情以及与其他门派的恩怨，比如狂刀门和绝剑门的火烧凌云窟大型剧情
③ 每个门派都有自己突出的突出体系，以及规则：比如少林的从扫地僧至罗汉堂首座，敲钟玩法及铜人阵
④ 每个门派都强调自己的武学、心法体系
⑤ 每个门派都可以模拟经营、占领大世界的比如矿山青楼，并开启对应的经营
⑥ 每个门派都一样骑马与砍杀一样的世界争霸

4.  自由成长：习百家武学，走你自己的江湖

cn.description:
《鬼谷八荒》是一款开放世界的沙盒修仙游戏。结合了修仙体系与山海经文化背景，体验从凡人一步步修行成长为强者的过程，与山海经中各种妖、兽战斗。你是否能坚守本心，与困难做斗争；慎做抉择，把握自己的命运。

【遁入修仙世界，开启逆天人生】
鬼谷八荒, 除了财侣法地，还有诡秘莫测的妖兽，危机重重的秘境，难以逾越的天堑，彩光四射的秘宝，等着被人发现。
你将作为一个炼气期小修士从愚村出发，修炼，变强，危机中九死一生。每一次突破，你都能逆天改命，助你在旅途中披荆斩棘，跨越五大州，睥睨天下，再闯上天元山，向天道一问。
【ai互动生态，给NPC完整的一生】
我们构建了完整的NPC互动生态，他们“生活”在这里，有自己的朋友亲族关系网，自己的人生轨迹，不受玩家的进度限制，除非，你决定出手干涉。
你可兼济天下，携手红颜；你可独善其身，快意恩仇；你亦可逆天而行，与全世界为敌。
和NPC们切磋武艺，传授道心，拜师学艺，收徒授业。和NPC在拍卖场喊价厮杀，结束后拔刀相向或顺手牵羊。你将成为修仙界群像中的一部分，是大放异彩，还是默默修行，皆看你如何选择。
【体验小说桥段，感受奇遇惊喜】
英雄救美？爱人为你争风吃醋？五十年之约？卷入神秘组织的明争暗斗？遗迹遇宝？又惨遭夺宝？
这些都有可能发生在你身上。
除NPC交互之外，这里还有丰富的随机事件以及支线任务，在你的旅途中给予惊喜。它们或许会让你烦恼，喂你刀子，也可能让你化险为夷，甚至破而后立。在一步又一步的选择的过程中，你将谱写只属于你的，独一无二的故事。
【打造最强宗门，攻城略地一统八荒】
我们构建了宗门的经营玩法，身为弟子，长老以及宗主，将会有不同的体验。你可以加入大宗门，从最底层的弟子做起，一步步爬上权力的阶梯。也可以空降落魄的小宗门，力挽狂澜，带领宗门重振雄风。
弟子可以完成宗门任务，在宗门大比中出战，或随同门出征作战，为宗门积累资源，为宗门赢取荣誉，为宗门扩张土地。
长老可以管辖门下弟子，传道授业，分配任务职能，加速宗门成长，在宗门大战中指导弟子大杀四方。
宗主则需要统筹全宗的秩序，制定侵略和防守计划，攻防灵矿等资源点，甚至占领他人宗门，夺取专属逆天改命和秘籍。
一统八荒，只要你有宏图壮志和铁腕手段，不再只是幻想。
【构筑独特流派，挑战妖兽神仙】
闯荡这世界，需要有傍身之技。
心法筑根基，武技/灵技探深浅，身法创机会，绝技造优势，神通定乾坤。不同秘籍有不同的特性。
修仙者还有十二大灵根，对应不同的流派，你可以选择专精一路，或全面发展。十二种灵根都有对应的功法秘籍，排列组合可组成丰富的流派，孰强孰弱，皆由你评断。
城镇琅琊阁，宗门功法阁，秘境，各种任务，甚至路边一个土坑里，都可能发现珍奇秘籍，充满惊喜。
这个世界上还有上百种珍奇妖兽，无数修仙者，鬼怪，仙人供您检验自己的实力。挑战升仙擂台，冲击各大洲参玄榜，以此证明自己的实力。你能否踏破冥山的障碍一路向前？构筑的流派能否经历大浪淘沙的检验？
【法宝器灵炼丹画符，三大神器伴前路】
练好自身本领，也别忘了外力加持。
开局三大神器，每一个都会给你带来一种独一无二的系统。双鱼佩可以复活自己和选中之人，昊天眼可以偷学妖兽技能，洞察更多信息，而炼妖壶则可以让你捕获BOSS成为你的小跟班，替你战斗或派遣寻求宝物。
除了开局神器之外，你也能炼制你自己的法宝，并收服器灵与你一起战斗，此外器灵还会在探索中给予你陪伴，触发专属的奇遇等等。
在这里，你还可以学习炼丹画符，堪舆风水，制作帮助你探索世界，整蛊仇人，战斗杀敌的种种道具。至于如何发挥它们真正的作用，皆看各位道友如何抉择。

三秒记一笔！快速、安全、好用是我们的宗旨，更有 iOS 通知中心的Widget插件。

IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

hk.description:
极具真实感的俯视视角拉力赛体验！
《Rush Rally Origins》是在初代《Rush Rally》经典俯视视角赛车玩法的基础上，结合《Rush Rally 3》广受好评的精美画质与物理引擎打造而成。游戏中包含有 36 条全新且各有特色的赛道，赛道遍布世界各地，每条赛道的时区和天气情况都会有所不同。比赛会在各种不同路况下进行，包括雪地、碎石、泥土、泥浆和柏油路面！


感受极速快感
在 60fps（在支持的设备上可达到 120fps）的极速环境中，驾驶当前空气动力性能最好的赛车车型，这些赛车在《Rush Rally Origins》中都经过了高度调教，极具驾驶乐趣，使玩家可以尽享俯视视角竞赛所带来的极致体验。在通过不同路况时可以时刻感受到抓地力的改变，不同气候条件也会使驾驶体验千差万别。


世界拉力赛
完成一系列冠军拉力赛事，在我们独特的“点对点”竞赛模式下与其他选手同场竞速，亦或是保持专注，在计时赛模式下集中精力提高自己的完赛时间。


勇攀高峰
打破赛道记录，在全球在线排行榜上扬名立万。下载 4 种车型各异的幽灵赛车，与世界最顶尖车手一较高下。


升级赛车
解锁并升级一系列《Rush Rally》经典车型。利用简便的升级系统来为您量身打造每款车型，以期符合您特定驾驶风格的需求。


优化操控性
游戏操控系统经过详细设计，可同时支持触屏和手柄游玩，使游戏具有更多乐趣，而且在不同设备上都可获得一致的操控体验。同时还提供包括缩放、移动和切换功能的按键，您可以按需选择使用。

三秒記一筆！快速、安全、好用是我們的宗旨，更有 iOS 通知中心的Widget插件。

mo.description:
《Digline》是一款輕鬆上手的鑽探遊戲。每一次向地下深入，都是一場在進度與風險之間的抉擇，而真正的獎勵，總藏在更深的地底。

每次探險都從你的工坊開始。選擇裝備，駕駛燃料有限、設備簡陋的鑽探機出發。開鑿屬於自己的路線，穿越不斷變化的地層，決定要收集哪些資源，並在燃料耗盡前，思考該升級什麼、交易什麼。

每一次下潛，都可能發現新的材料、更稀有的礦物，以及地底深處意想不到的規律。原本只是單純的挖掘，逐漸演變成探索、效率與時機掌握之間的巧妙平衡。

回到地面後，持續優化你的策略，讓每一次探險都更有效率：

• 升級鑽頭、燃料容量與鑽探效率
• 解鎖價值更高、埋藏更深的新材料
• 規劃最佳路線，讓每一次下潛都收穫滿滿

你的進度會穩定累積，但每一次探險都充滿張力。太過保守，就會錯失珍貴資源；冒險太深，則可能失去一切。

打造屬於自己的探勘節奏：快速有效率的短程挖掘、高風險高報酬的深層探險，或穩紮穩打，逐步征服地底世界。

曾登上美國、英國休閒遊戲排行榜前 10 名，以及德國、挪威等多國前 5 名。現在就加入這場挖掘冒險吧！

原本只是尋找資源的旅程，卻漸漸變得更加神秘。你挖出的隧道會永久保留，地圖會隨著探索不斷擴展，而地下世界也開始不像隨機生成，更像是一個擁有自己歷史的地方。

《Digline》設計理念就是容易上手、適合利用零碎時間遊玩，同時又能帶來長期的成就感。快速開挖、短程探險，享受源源不絕的輕鬆樂趣。

特色：

• 直覺式單指直向操作
• 每次探險只需一、兩分鐘，隨時都能遊玩
• 永久保留的地下隧道，以及持續擴展的地圖
• 多個地下區域，各自擁有不同的資源、危險與驚喜
• 收集資源，用於製作升級與更完善的探險準備
• 工坊系統，讓每一次成功探險都化為永久成長
• 市場交易系統，出售帶回來的資源
• 跨越多次遊戲持續累積的成長，而非單次探險
• 寧靜舒適的氛圍，搭配充滿探索感的地下世界
• 無廣告，沒有任何付費才能獲勝的機制
• 應玩家熱烈要求，現在可選擇購買燃料，繼續向更深處前進，但不需任何付費也能完整體驗整個遊戲
• 成就系統與「每日挖掘」排行榜競賽

挖得越深，礦坑揭露的秘密就越多。

tw.description:
Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

us.releaseNotes: Star in the live-action interactive drama! Shape a dynasty's fate in Road to Empress II, the new content of the global hit. Defy fate, claim the throne—you decide it all!
us.description:
This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters.

A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices!
Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power.

● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues
Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally.
Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory!

● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined
Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast!

● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story!
Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne.

● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life
With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate!
You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings.

● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm
A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips:

Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush.
Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision!

● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked
At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile!

About New One Studio

An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage.

Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan.

Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress.

In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage.

In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you!

(Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.)

X：https://x.com/roadtoempressen
Instagram：https://www.instagram.com/roadtoempress/
Discord：https://discord.gg/roadtoempress

us.description:
IIWII is a minimalist camera app that brings the beauty of analog film photography to your iPhone.

IT IS WHAT IT IS — No complicated settings, no endless menus. Just point, shoot, and capture authentic moments with stunning film-inspired looks applied in real-time.

TIMELESS FILM LOOKS
• Carefully crafted presets inspired by classic film stocks
• Real-time preview — what you see is what you get
• Adjustable intensity for your perfect look
• Import your own .cube LUT files as custom looks
• Look Manager — create and fine-tune your looks with tone curves, color mixing, white balance and more
• Natural Processing — less computational overprocessing, more authentic camera feel

FULL MANUAL CONTROL
• White Balance, Shutter Speed, ISO and Focus
• Each parameter toggleable between Auto and Manual
• Swipe down to reveal, swipe up to hide

THOUGHTFUL FEATURES
• RAW+ Capture on all iPhones — save DNG files alongside your photo
• Portrait mode with natural depth-of-field blur
• Double Exposure — blend two shots into one, just like real film
• Self-Timer with 2, 5 or 10 second countdown
• Record video with real-time film looks applied
• Grid overlays and horizon level for composition
• Built-in gallery with sharing and favorites
• QR Code detection

DESIGNED FOR SIMPLICITY
• Clean, distraction-free interface
• Ambient light effect reacts to your camera feed (iOS 26)
• Quick preset switching with swipe gestures
• Double-tap to flip camera
• Edge exposure slider for precise control
• Customizable top bar — choose your controls
• Lock Screen camera with shared settings and looks

PRIVACY FIRST
• GPS tagging is optional and controllable
• Location data automatically removed when sharing (configurable)
• No analytics, no tracking, no ads — ever

IIWII respects your moments. No cloud uploads, no accounts, no subscriptions. Your photos stay on your device.

Capture what matters. It is what it is.

tr.description:
Life on Tiny Planet was calm and carefree until a great disaster occurred - Tiny Planet was hit by a meteor! The world fell apart and now its future depends only on you! Use your imagination and creativity: in order to restore Tiny Planet and help its inhabitants you will have to fix a variety of machines and mechanisms as well as solve puzzles in each of the five chapters of this game. Navigation is simple and intuitive. It doesn't distract you from the witty brain teasers, and you will be able to fully immerse yourself in the unique atmosphere of the game.

*There is no text in this game. It is fun for all ages and suitable for the whole family!
*Five vastly different chapters and over 30 exciting brain teasers (minigames)
*A bright, gorgeous world drawn entirely by hand
*Absorbing game play and simple navigation
*10 enchanting musical themes

- #1 Top Paid Apps for iOS in UK, Japan, German, Russia

Digline is a relaxed and easy to learn drilling game where every descent is a gamble between progress and risk, and the real reward lies deeper underground.

Start each run in your workshop, pick your setup, and head down with limited fuel and a scrappy rig. Carve your path through shifting layers of earth, decide what to collect, and choose what to upgrade and what to trade before everything runs out.

Each dive reveals new materials, rarer finds, and unexpected patterns beneath the surface. What begins as simple digging gradually turns into a careful balance between exploration, efficiency, and timing.

Back at the surface, refine your strategy and improve your runs:

• Upgrade your drill, fuel capacity, and efficiency
• Unlock new materials with higher value and deeper placement
• Optimize routes to maximize each descent

Progress builds steadily, but every run carries tension. Go too safe and you leave value behind. Push too far and risk losing it all.

Shape your own rhythm underground: short and efficient runs, deep high-risk dives, or a steady climb toward mastering what lies below.

Top 10 casual game in the US and UK, Top 5 in Germany, Norway, and others. Come join the fun!

What starts as a simple search for resources gradually becomes something stranger. Your old tunnels remain, your map expands over time, and the underground begins to feel less random and more like a place with its own history.

Digline is designed to be easy to pick up, fun in short sessions, and rewarding over the long term. Quick digs, short descents, tons of relaxing fun.

Features:

• intuitive one-finger portrait controls
• short runs that fit easily into a minute or two
• persistent tunnels and a map that grows with each expedition
• multiple underground regions with different materials, hazards, and surprises
• resources to gather and use for crafting upgrades, and better preparation
• a workshop that turns each successful run into permanent progress
• a market system for trading what you bring back
• progression that builds across many sessions, not just a single run
• a calm, cozy atmosphere with a sense of discovery underneath it
• no ads, and no pay-to-win systems
• by popular request, you can now purchase fuel if you want to keep on digging, but the game can be completed without any purchase
• achievements and Daily Dig leaderboard competition

The deeper you go, the more the mine will reveal.

tr.releaseNotes: Star in the live-action interactive drama! Shape a dynasty's fate in Road to Empress II, the new content of the global hit. Defy fate, claim the throne—you decide it all!
tr.description:
This drama requires an internet connection. Road to Empress I contains 16 chapters; Road to Empress II contains 32 chapters. Both include free trial chapters.

A palace adventure unlike anything you've played—shaped entirely by your choices!
Road to Empress II is now available! Step into a world of Eastern palace intrigue and power.

● Building on Road to Empress I, The Palace Legend Continues
Road to Empress I has captivated audiences globally.
Now, Road to Empress II plunges you into a gripping battle of court politics. Watch a legendary empress rise to new glory!

● 4K Cinematic Quality, Eastern Palace Aesthetics Reimagined
Filmed on lavishly built sets with 4K cinematic lighting, the story brings Eastern palaces to life: silk brocade texture, glinting golden hairpins, and a stirring traditional score. Featuring actors Kuan Hung, Evie Huang, Zeawo Yao, and Hana Lin. Sweeping scenes and nuanced performances ensure this golden age unfold right before your eyes. This is the ultimate Eastern aesthetic feast!

● From Unknown Girl to Legendary Empress, Write Your Own Story!
Ready to defy fate? Dive into the most thrilling palace power struggles ever! Rise from an unknown girl, break through rival factions, and climb to the peak of power. Think like a ruler: balance court power, plan ahead, and carve a blazing path to the throne.

● Approx.1,500 Minutes, Fully Immersed in Ruling Empress's Life
With around 1,500 minutes (I & II) of live-action content, immerse yourself in a sweeping saga of ambition and survival. Every choice triggers a chain of consequences. Twists and suspense await as you seize control and rewrite a dynasty's fate!
You decide who rises in the global popularity rankings.

● Stop Being a Spectator, Start Ruling Your Realm
A fully upgraded interactive experience: power is a battle of wits at your fingertips:

Review Memorials: Work through memorials, balance noble houses, and shape the empire with one stroke of your brush.
Issue Edicts: Weigh every decision and define the court's fate. Rule with an iron fist or a merciful hand, and build the empire you envision!

● What Kind of Ruler Are You? Exclusive Trait Sketch Unlocked
At story's end, unlock an exclusive imperial trait sketch covering your scheming style, crisis decision-making, and methods of control. Are you the "Deadly Arsenic Trioxide"—cool, versatile, balancing power and passion? The "Romantic Datura"—loyal, ride-or-die, charging headfirst through fire? Or the "Overachiever Lurid Bolete"—ruthless, letting nothing stand in the way of ambition? Discover who you really are and share your exclusive empress profile!

About New One Studio

An independent team focused on interactive storytelling, blending Eastern culture with interactive media. In 2019, our users championed The Invisible Guardian and earned us a BAFTA, proving great interactive storytelling can live in people's hearts. Road to Empress depicts the deadly beauty of Eastern intrigue — a battlefield that tests your wisdom and courage.

Two works, different stories, one shared vision: let global users experience traditional Eastern culture. A bridge across cultures for every FMV fan.

Road to Empress is a saga of the legendary empress.

In Road to Empress I, follow a legendary beginning — an unknown girl navigating deadly palace power struggles with wisdom and courage.

In Road to Empress II, return as a master strategist. Stakes are brutally higher. Pull the strings, keep ministers in check, and forge a golden age. Every word of your empire's legacy — written by you!

(Official Orange Light Authorization, with sincere thanks to Orange Light for their music support.)

Wipr blocks ads, popups, trackers, cookie warnings, and other nasty things that make the web slow and ugly.

Websites in Safari will look clean, load fast, and stop invisibly tracking you. You’ll notice significant improvements to your battery life and data usage. Setup is a snap.

The Filtr add-on extends Wipr’s blocking to all apps on your device. It acts at the network level, but unlike a VPN, it can access none of your data, and can be used in conjunction with VPNs, iCloud Private Relay, and custom DNS.

Wipr’s blocklist is updated twice a week automatically, and has enhanced versions for the following languages: Bosnian, Chinese, Croatian, Czech, Danish, Dutch, Estonian, Finnish, French, German, Greek, Hebrew, Hindi, Hungarian, Icelandic, Indonesian, Italian, Japanese, Korean, Macedonian, Malay, Montenegrin, Norwegian, Polish, Romanian, Russian, Serbian, Slovak, Spanish, Thai, and Vietnamese.

Wipr is a universal app: install it on all your devices (iPhone, iPad, Mac, Vision Pro) with a single purchase. It’s fully accessible with VoiceOver, Voice Control, and more. Dark, Tinted, and Clear icon variants are included. Family Sharing is supported.

Because it’s developed by a single independent developer and 100% funded by its users, Wipr only answers to you: no one can pay to have their ads unblocked, and there are no “acceptable ads”.

This app was made with love and patience. I hope you’ll enjoy using it as much as I enjoyed designing and building it.

– Kaylee

pt.description:
Digline é um jogo de perfuração relaxante e fácil de aprender, onde cada descida é uma pequena aposta entre progresso e risco, e a verdadeira recompensa está mais fundo no subsolo.

Comece cada partida na sua oficina, escolha sua configuração e desça com combustível limitado e um equipamento improvisado. Abra caminho através de camadas de terra em constante mudança, decida o que coletar e escolha o momento certo para voltar antes que tudo se esgote.

Cada descida revela novos materiais, descobertas mais raras e padrões inesperados sob a superfície. O que começa como uma simples escavação gradualmente se transforma em um equilíbrio cuidadoso entre exploração, eficiência e tempo.

De volta à superfície, refine sua estratégia e melhore suas partidas:

• Melhore sua perfuradora, capacidade de combustível e eficiência
• Desbloqueie novos materiais de maior valor e localizados mais profundamente
• Otimize rotas para maximizar cada descida

O progresso se acumula de forma constante, mas cada partida carrega tensão. Se jogar com muita cautela, você deixa valor para trás. Se avançar demais, corre o risco de perder tudo.

Defina seu próprio ritmo no subsolo: partidas curtas e eficientes, descidas profundas de alto risco ou uma progressão constante rumo ao domínio do que está abaixo.

Top 10 jogos casuais nos Estados Unidos e no Reino Unido, Top 5 na Alemanha, Noruega e outros. Venha se juntar à diversão!

O que começa como uma simples busca por recursos gradualmente se torna algo mais estranho. Seus antigos túneis permanecem, seu mapa se expande com o tempo, e o subsolo passa a parecer menos aleatório e mais como um lugar com sua própria história.

Digline foi projetado para ser fácil de começar, divertido em sessões curtas e recompensador no longo prazo. Escavações rápidas, descidas curtas, muita diversão relaxante.

Recursos:

• controles intuitivos com um dedo em modo retrato
• partidas curtas que cabem facilmente em um ou dois minutos
• túneis persistentes e um mapa que cresce a cada expedição
• múltiplas regiões subterrâneas com diferentes materiais, perigos e surpresas
• recursos para coletar e usar na criação de melhorias e melhor preparação
• uma oficina que transforma cada partida bem-sucedida em progresso permanente
• um sistema de mercado para negociar o que você traz de volta
• progressão que se constrói ao longo de muitas sessões, não apenas uma única partida
• uma atmosfera calma e aconchegante com um senso de descoberta por baixo
• sem anúncios, sem compras dentro do aplicativo e sem sistemas pay-to-win
• conquistas e competição no placar do Daily Dig

Quanto mais fundo você vai, mais a mina revela.

Rush Rally Origins combina as corridas clássicas na perspetiva vertical do original Rush Rally com os gráficos e a física fortemente elogiados de Rush Rally 3. Corre em 36 etapas novas e únicas em todo o mundo, onde a hora do dia e as condições meteorológicas são variantes importantes. Mostra os teus dotes ao volante em diferentes tipos de piso, incluindo neve, gravilha, terra, lama e asfalto!

SENTE A ADRENALINA
Corre a 60 fps (120 fps nos dispositivos compatíveis) com um dos melhores modelos de dinâmica de carros até à data, especialmente afinado para o Rush Rally Origins para proporcionar uma experiência de corrida mais divertida na perspetiva vertical. Sente a aderência à estrada a mudar consoante o piso e as condições atmosféricas.

CAMPEONATOS DE RALLY
Compete numa série de campeonatos de rally, corre contra outros no original modo A-B Race ou mantém o sangue frio e a concentração para melhorares os teus tempos no modo de jogo de contrarrelógio.

CHEGA AO TOPO
Bate os recordes das etapas para subires ao topo das tabelas classificativas online do mundo inteiro. Transfere fantasmas em 4 diferentes classes de carros para comparares as tuas trajetórias de corrida com as dos melhores do mundo.

APERFEIÇOA OS TEUS CARROS
Desbloqueia e melhora uma seleção de carros Rush Rally clássicos. Usa o nosso sistema simples de melhorias para afinares cada carro de acordo com o teu próprio estilo de condução.

CONTROLOS OTIMIZADOS!
Um sistema de controlo concebido para ser compatível com ecrãs táteis e comandos de jogo torna a condução ainda mais divertida e consistente. Até podes aumentar a escala e mudar e trocar botões de acordo com as tuas necessidades.
